onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to the Manor
onboarding.welcome.body: Your assistant to organize income, expenses, goals and wealth in one place — with clarity and discretion.
onboarding.categories.title: Categories ready for you
onboarding.categories.body: Food, Transport, Housing, Health, Leisure, Education, Subscriptions and Others are already set up.
onboarding.quickadd.title: Quick entry
onboarding.quickadd.body: Use the New button in the top bar to record income or expenses in seconds.
onboarding.checklist.title: Your starter guide
onboarding.checklist.body: Follow the steps below to complete your dashboard. You can resume anytime from Home.
onboarding.checklist.label: Getting started checklist
dashboard.customize.title: Customize dashboard
dashboard.customize.desc: Choose what to show and the order of blocks.
export.label: Export
pwa.installDesc: Add Alfred to your home screen for quick access.
pwa.offline.title: You are offline
pwa.offline.body: Some features are unavailable without a connection. Your data will sync when you are back online.
profile.customTheme.desc: Adjust colors and font of your virtual office.
